parsed.availability_comment: Cleared after groin issue ahead of the 2026 T20 World Cup and no later absence signal found for DC duty.
parsed.availability_note: Recent injury concern appears resolved; no current report suggesting IPL unavailability.
parsed.followup_reason: No official DC opening-match XI confirmation yet; Miller's exact lock status still depends on overseas combination and pitch plan.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Miller is a favored finisher option, but DC can swap to an extra overseas seamer depending on conditions.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes mainly with Duckett/Nissanka for batting slot and with Ngidi/Chameera/Jamieson for overall overseas balance; Stubbs and Starc look harder to dislodge.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Experienced left-hand finisher; strong fit in DC's first-choice middle order, but overseas-bowler balance keeps him just short of guaranteed.
